verse.name: V1
verse.lines: I'm forgiven Because You were forsaken I'm accepted, You were condemned I'm alive and well, Your Spirit is within me Because You died and rose again

verse.name: V2
verse.lines: Amazing love, how can it be That You, my King, would die for me? Amazing love, I know it's true It's my joy to honor You In all I do, I honor You

verse.name: V3
verse.lines: We sing, You are my King You are my King Jesus, You are my King
